content: Hi, I'm Spencer, nice to talk to you. I've been recovering from a knee injury, so I've had to adjust my routine a bit.
Hi Spencer, sorry to hear that you're dealing with a knee injury. How are you feeling, and what kind of adjustments have you had to make?

I'm feeling a bit better, thanks for asking. I've had to take it easy and avoid any activities that might aggravate the injury, like hiking or biking. But I've been able to keep up with my knitting, which has been a great way to relax.
That's great that you've been able to find ways to relax and take care of yourself. Knitting can be very therapeutic. What kind of things do you like to knit?

I like to knit scarves and hats, mostly. I've also been trying to learn how to knit sweaters, but it's a bit more challenging. I've been listening to a lot of podcasts while I knit, it's a great way to pass the time.
That sounds like a great way to spend your time. I've heard that knitting can be very meditative. What kind of podcasts do you like to listen to?
I like to listen to true crime podcasts, and also podcasts about science and history. I find them really interesting and informative.

That's great! True crime podcasts can be really fascinating, and science and history podcasts can be very educational. Do you have any favorite board games or activities that you like to do with your family and friends?
Yeah, I love playing board games! My favorite game is Scrabble, I've been playing it for years. I also like to play card games like poker and blackjack.

Scrabble is a great game! It's a good way to challenge yourself and have fun at the same time. Do you have any plans for the upcoming holidays, or are you going to be taking it easy and recovering from your injury?
I'll probably be taking it easy, but I'm planning on spending some time with my family and friends. We're going to have a big dinner on Christmas Day, and I'm looking forward to that.
That sounds like a great way to spend the holiday. I'm sure you'll have a lot of fun. What do you do for work, if you don't mind me asking?
I'm a veterinarian, I work at a rural practice. It's a bit challenging at times, but it's very rewarding to be able to help animals and their owners.
That's really admirable. I'm sure it can be challenging, but it's great that you're passionate about your work. Have you had any interesting cases recently?
Actually, yes! I had a case last week where I had to help a dog that had eaten something it shouldn't have. It was a bit of an emergency, but everything turned out okay in the end.
Wow, that sounds like a intense situation! I'm glad everything turned out okay. It's great that you're able to make a difference in the lives of animals and their owners.
Thanks, I feel very lucky to be able to do this work. I'm also lucky to have a great team at the practice, including my colleague, Dr. Lee.
That's great to hear! It's always important to have a good team behind you. I'm sure Dr. Lee is a big help.
Yeah, she is. We make a great team. Anyway, I should probably get going, it was nice talking to you.
You too, Spencer! It was great talking to you, and I hope you have a great holiday season.
Thanks, you too. Take care!
You too, take care.
